tool.name: Gemini CLI
tool.description: An open-source AI agent for the command line, built on the Gemini model, that helps developers with coding tasks directly from the terminal.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli/compare/v0.37.0-preview.0...v0.37.0-preview.1

releases.name: Release v0.37.0-preview.0
